description_long: This helmet features a weathered metallic surface with a prominent T-shaped visor area outlined in black, reminiscent of Mandalorian-style headgear. The dome is rounded and shows signs of wear, scratches, and rust, with a muted gray base color and a horizontal mustard-yellow band encircling the helmet. On the right side, a vertical rangefinder or antenna attachment extends upward, adding a functional and distinctive silhouette. The rear of the helmet includes a small rectangular vent, suggesting some airflow or cooling capability. The left side is relatively plain, with the yellow band continuing and a subtle seam visible. The overall design is utilitarian, robust, and iconic, suitable for both protection and identity concealment in urban environments.
description: A weathered, metallic helmet with a T-shaped black visor, mustard-yellow band, and a side-mounted rangefinder, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped black visor, yellow band, and the rangefinder attachment on the right side.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlights the rangefinder's vertical extension and the continuation of the yellow band.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a small rectangular vent and the full encircling yellow band.
description_view_3: Left-side view displays the plain side with the yellow band and the rear of the rangefinder attachment.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: One small rectangular vent at the rear center of the helmet.
attribute_graphic_design: Solid colors with a horizontal yellow band and black T-shaped visor; no additional graphics or motifs.
